title: phlegmariurus reflexus
intro: Phlegmariurus reflexus, also known as the reflexed club moss, is a species of club moss in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus reflexus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential in treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Phlegmariurus reflexus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
